# 1С:Отель Training Landing — TASolution

## What this site is
A landing page for an online training course on 1С:Отель (1C:Hotel) software, edition 9 (thin client).
Offered by TASolution / Tripadvance (tasolution.ru), a company specializing in hotel automation on 1C platform.

## Course overview
- 3-day online course, 6 hours per day (18 hours total)
- Designed for front-office staff: receptionists, senior administrators, front-office managers
- Covers: reservations (booking), check-in/check-out, housekeeping module, reports, invoicing, cash register closing
- Language: Russian
- Format: online, flexible schedule

## Company
